hero.headline: MUJ Online MBA in Project Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved Super/Dual specialization. 12 spec subjects in Sem 3-4. NAAC A+, NIRF #58.

sections.tldr: MUJ Online MBA in Project Management covers introduction to project management, project planning and scheduling, project finance and budgeting, managing human resources in projects, quantitative methods, risk management, quality management, and contracts management for professionals targeting senior project manager or PMO director roles. NAAC A+, NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000 upfront (15% off) or Rs 1,80,000. Super/Dual spec — pair with Operations or IT and FinTech. Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (70% off).

about.body:
Project Management is the MBA specialization for professionals who lead structured delivery of business change: project managers, programme managers, PMO analysts, and delivery leads in IT, infrastructure, and EPC who want to move into PMO Director, VP Project Delivery, or Chief Programme Officer roles. The MUJ Online MBA in Project Management covers the full project management discipline: planning and scheduling, finance and budgeting, HR in projects, quantitative methods, risk management, quality management, and contracts management.

MUJ's Super/Dual specialization adds strategic depth to the project management credential. Pairing Project Management with Operations Management creates an end-to-end operations and delivery profile for manufacturing and EPC companies. Pairing with IT and FinTech creates a technology project delivery credential for IT services and digital transformation programmes. Both combinations align with how large infrastructure and technology employers hire senior project leaders.

The Coursera Plus bundle at Rs 3,999 gives Project Management students access to Google Project Management, PMP exam preparation, and agile project management courses from University of California Irvine and University of Virginia — cost-effective certifications that complement the MUJ curriculum.

Manipal University Jaipur Online is NAAC A+ accredited with NIRF #58 University ranking for 2025. EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from MUJ. Full programme overview at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Project strategy alignment with business strategy, portfolio prioritisation, and benefits realisation management.

sem3Subjects.name: Term Paper
sem3Subjects.description: Independent research paper applying project management theory to a real-world delivery challenge.

sem3Subjects.name: Introduction to Project Management
sem3Subjects.description: Project lifecycle, PMBOK framework, project charter, scope management, and stakeholder identification.

sem3Subjects.name: Project Planning and Scheduling
sem3Subjects.description: Work breakdown structure, network diagrams, critical path method, resource levelling, and schedule compression.

sem3Subjects.name: Project Finance and Budgeting
sem3Subjects.description: Cost estimation, earned value management, project cash flow analysis, and financial control for large projects.

sem3Subjects.name: Managing Human Resources in Projects
sem3Subjects.description: Project team formation, responsibility assignment matrices, motivation in project environments, and conflict resolution.

sem4Subjects.name: International Business Management
sem4Subjects.description: Managing cross-border projects, international contracting, and multi-geography programme governance.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Major dissertation applying project management specialization to an original applied delivery or programme study.

sem4Subjects.name: Quantitative Methods in Project Management
sem4Subjects.description: Monte Carlo simulation, decision trees, PERT analysis, and quantitative risk models for project scheduling and cost.

sem4Subjects.name: Project Risk Management
sem4Subjects.description: Risk identification, qualitative and quantitative risk analysis, risk response planning, and risk monitoring on live projects.

sem4Subjects.name: Project Quality Management
sem4Subjects.description: Quality planning for projects, deliverable inspection, ISO 21500 quality management, and quality audits in project environments.

sem4Subjects.name: Contracts Management in Projects
sem4Subjects.description: Contract types (lump sum, cost-plus, unit rate), tendering, claims management, and dispute resolution in project contracts.

syllabus.note: Semester 1 and 2 subjects are shared across all MUJ Online MBA specializations. Full programme structure at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

whoHires.body:
Project Management MBA graduates from Manipal University Jaipur Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT services, EPC and infrastructure, Real estate development, Manufacturing capital projects, Consulting

**Entry-level roles:** Project Coordinator, PMO Analyst, Project Scheduler, Project Finance Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Project Manager, Senior Project Manager, PMO Manager, Programme Delivery Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** PMO Director, VP Project Delivery, Programme Director, Chief Programme Officer

**Top hiring organisations:** L&T, Tata Projects, Shapoorji Pallonji, Accenture Delivery, TCS, Wipro, IBM Project Management, Infosys Delivery, DLF, Godrej Properties

skills.body:
The Project Management specialization builds skills that IT services and infrastructure employers test at senior project manager and PMO director levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Schedule Management: CPM and PERT network analysis, baseline schedule development, schedule variance analysis, and recovery planning
- Earned Value Management: CPI and SPI calculation, cost variance analysis, forecasting EAC and ETC, and project performance dashboards
- Risk Management: risk register development, Monte Carlo simulation for project risk, risk response strategy, and residual risk tracking
- Contracts Management: FIDIC and NEC contract frameworks, claims preparation, variation order management, and contract dispute resolution

**Applied skills:**
- PMO Design: setting up project management offices, defining PM methodologies, and building project governance frameworks
- Agile Project Management: scrum framework for IT projects, sprint planning, velocity tracking, and hybrid agile-waterfall delivery

**Soft skills:** Presenting project status and recovery plans to steering committees, managing multi-vendor project teams, negotiating contract variations with clients, and communicating schedule and cost risk to non-technical sponsors.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MUJ Online MBA Project Management against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Project Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity Project Management covers PRINCE2 and agile frameworks in depth. MUJ Project Management has strong quantitative methods, contracts management, and project finance coverage. For EPC and infrastructure project managers, MUJ's contracts and finance content is directly applicable. Amity NIRF #22 carries stronger weight at consulting firms.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA:** NMIMS does not offer a dedicated Project Management specialization in its online MBA. For professionals specifically targeting project management leadership, MUJ's dedicated 12-subject spec is more relevant than a general NMIMS management specialization.

**vs LPU Online MBA Project Management:** LPU is NAAC A++ with project management offering. LPU covers PMBOK and agile. MUJ's quantitative methods and contracts management subjects are differentiators for infrastructure and EPC project management. MUJ's Super/Dual spec flexibility and Coursera Plus (Google Project Management Certificate) are additional advantages.

fees.body:
The total program fee for the Manipal University Jaipur Online MBA in Project Management can be paid through 2 options:

**Option 1 — Semester-wise payment**: Rs 45,000 per semester, Rs 1,80,000 total across 4 semesters
**Option 2 — Full upfront payment (discounted)**: Rs 1,53,000 one-time (Rs 1,80,000 standard less 15 percent fee concession)

A one-time registration fee of Rs 500 applies at enrolment. MUJ does not charge separate exam fees per attempt, project evaluation fees, or admission processing fees beyond this.

For working professionals, MUJ offers a 24-month zero-cost EMI plan at approximately Rs 7,500 per month on the standard fee (Rs 6,375 per month on the discounted fee) through its NBFC lending partners.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable — pick one based on eligibility):
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% discount with Divyaang certificate
- **Defence personnel**: 20% discount with Service/IC number
- **Manipal University Jaipur alumni** (UG or PG): 20% discount
- **Government employees**: 10% discount with Govt ID
- **Merit scholarship**: 10% discount for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's

**Coursera Plus bundled access** (MUJ differentiator): Enrolled MUJ students get Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). This includes 10,000+ courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and other top global universities.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Manipal University Jaipur each quarter. Please reconfirm current offers and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The Manipal University Jaipur degree certificate carries the Manipal University Jaipur name, the MBA designation, and identifies the online learning mode per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The Project Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode identification on the certificate is standard for UGC-DEB approved programmes and equivalent in recognition to regular MBA degrees for employment, promotions, and further studies.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from MUJ Online MBA Project Management alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Sanjay Nair
items.liked: Earned value management and quantitative methods subjects gave me analytical tools I had been applying by instinct for 6 years
items.disliked: PRINCE2 and agile certifications are not embedded in the curriculum — would have added significant value to have these as exam prep paths
items.body: I manage infrastructure projects at an IT services company. The EVM, risk management, and contracts management subjects gave me the formal frameworks I was missing. Paired Project Management with Operations for a comprehensive delivery and operations credential. Got promoted to Senior Programme Manager 11 months after completing the degree. The Manipal brand and NIRF #58 were specifically cited by my HR when approving the promotion. The Google Project Management Certificate via Coursera Plus was a useful LinkedIn addition.

items.name: Geeta Rao
items.liked: Contracts management in projects was practical and relevant — no other MBA programme I researched covered FIDIC and claims at this level
items.disliked: LMS was slow when downloading large project management templates and case study files. Upload and download speeds were inconsistent
items.body: I work in project controls at an EPC company. The contracts, risk management, and project finance subjects were directly applicable to my day-to-day work. Paired Project Management with Finance for a combined project finance and delivery credential for infrastructure roles. The Coursera Plus PMP exam prep courses were the most cost-effective exam study resource I found. Manipal degree accepted without any verification issues.

items.name: Amit Bose
items.liked: Project planning and scheduling was thorough — CPM, resource levelling, and schedule recovery planning were taught with practical cases
items.disliked: Placement support was non-existent for project management roles specifically. Career cell had no connections with IT project hiring or infrastructure companies
items.body: The content covered the right topics. Risk management, quantitative methods, and planning subjects were genuinely useful. The placement gap is the same issue every MUJ online review mentions — the career services team has no connections with companies that actively hire project managers. I attended a PMP networking event and landed my current senior PM role through that channel. The MBA credential helped with interview shortlisting. Placement support did not.

faqs.question: Can I choose dual specialization with the MUJ Online MBA in Project Management?
faqs.answer: Yes. MUJ's Super/Dual model lets you pick a second specialization at no extra cost. For Project Management, strong pairings include: Project Management plus Operations Management (for plant and manufacturing capital project roles), Project Management plus IT and FinTech (for IT programme delivery and digital transformation), or Project Management plus Supply Chain Management (for logistics infrastructure and procurement project roles). Both specs are recorded on your marksheet.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus access included or charged separately?
faqs.answer: Coursera Plus is available to enrolled MUJ students at Rs 3,999 per year (standard Rs 13,999 — 70% off). For Project Management students, Coursera Plus covers the Google Project Management Professional Certificate, PMP exam preparation courses, and agile project management specializations from University of Virginia and University of California Irvine. At Rs 3,999, this is one of the most cost-effective PMP study supplements available.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available for the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Five non-stackable categories: 20% for Divyaang individuals, 20% for Defence personnel, 20% for MUJ alumni, 10% for Government employees, and 10% merit scholarship for 80%+ marks. Plus, full upfront payment gets a 15% fee concession — reducing the total from Rs 1,80,000 to Rs 1,53,000.

faqs.question: What salary can Project Management MBA graduates from MUJ expect?
faqs.answer: Senior project managers and PMO managers with 5-8 years of experience and this MBA earn Rs 14-28 lakh at IT services and infrastructure companies. Programme directors and PMO directors earn Rs 22-45 lakh. Outcomes depend on sector (IT vs EPC vs real estate), project scale, and whether the MBA is supplemented with PMP or PRINCE2 certification, which significantly strengthens the credential combination for senior delivery roles.

faqs.question: Should I pursue PMP certification alongside this MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes for most project management career paths. The MBA provides the management framework and degree credential. PMP (Project Management Professional) certification from PMI provides the globally recognised practitioner credential that employers in IT services, EPC, and consulting specifically require for senior PM roles. The Coursera Plus access at Rs 3,999 makes PMP exam preparation courses accessible at low cost. Completing both positions you as a credentialed manager with a globally recognised practitioner certificate.

chooseIf: You are a project manager in IT, EPC, or infrastructure targeting PMO Director or VP Project Delivery roles that require a formal management degree.
You want 12 spec subjects covering project planning, EVM, risk management, and contracts at a NAAC A+ university under Rs 1.8 lakh.
You can use Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 to supplement your MBA with Google Project Management or PMP exam preparation courses.
consider: You need the PMP certification specifically — complete the PMP exam independently (via Coursera Plus prep) as it carries more direct employer recognition for project management specialist roles than the MBA alone.
You are in government or defence project management where NICMAR or IIPM project management credentials carry more sector-specific recognition.
You need active placement support for project management roles — MUJ online career services do not maintain connections with IT or infrastructure project hiring teams.
